dagger.description: A sharp blade, you can feel that too much pressure would cut your finger.

book.description: A book, the cover is made out of some sort of card. You tried to read it but you're blind.

tablet.description: A strange tablet small enough to fit in the palm of your hand, you aren't sure why but you feel like it might open some doors.

coins.description: A pile of coins looted from an unfortunate soul that was trapped here with you, this could be valuable.

key.description: A smooth key, made of an unknown medal.

hammer.description: A hammer, a strangely familiar object for where you find yourself.
